features.title: Tenant-scoped issuer boundary

features.title: Tenant OpenID configuration route
features.description: Adds GET /tenants/{tenant_slug}/.well-known/openid-configuration.

features.title: Tenant JWKS route
features.description: Adds GET /tenants/{tenant_slug}/.well-known/jwks.json.

features.title: Tenant discovery jwks_uri
features.description: Ensures tenant discovery emits a tenant-specific jwks_uri, not the root /.well-known/jwks.json.

features.title: Tenant JWKS key filtering
features.description: Ensures tenant JWKS returns only keys owned by that tenant.

features.title: Tenant JWKS rotation visibility
features.description: Defines active, next, and retired publication behavior during tenant key rotation.

features.title: Tenant public discovery disabled policy
features.description: Defines disabled or missing tenant behavior for public discovery routes, with 404 as the expected enumeration-resistant default.

features.title: Operator tenant JWKS runtime parity
features.description: Ensures keys publish-jwks --tenant X and runtime GET /tenants/X/.well-known/jwks.json agree on key selection and public material.

features.title: OpenAPI tenant discovery routes
features.description: Adds tenant discovery and JWKS routes to generated OpenAPI contracts.

features.title: Discovery snapshot tenant profile artifacts
features.description: Extends discovery snapshot generation to include tenant-scoped examples per profile.

features.title: Tenant issuer token validation contract
features.description: Locks the validation invariant that token iss must match the tenant discovery issuer and resolve to that tenant JWKS.

features.title: Tenant JWKS cross-tenant leakage guard
features.description: Negative coverage proving tenant A routes never expose tenant B keys or metadata.

features.title: UIX tenant JWKS publication view
features.description: Shows per-tenant active, next, and retired keys and the tenant jwks_uri as a UIX-facing view separate from runtime/API behavior.

features.title: Profile reference union
features.description: Makes --profile accept either a packaged runtime profile ID or an external YAML profile path as the single runtime configuration selector.

features.title: Profile ID resolution
features.description: Resolves --profile values such as baseline, production, hardening, fapi2-security, and peer-claim to packaged runtime profile YAML files.

features.title: Profile path resolution
features.description: Resolves --profile values that point to .yaml or .yml files as external runtime profile documents.

features.title: External profile YAML validation
features.description: Validates external profile YAML files against required fields, allowed extensions, base profile semantics, and typed runtime configuration values.

features.title: Profile reference fail-closed errors
features.description: Fails closed for unknown IDs, missing paths, directories, unsupported extensions, malformed YAML, ambiguous values, and inconsistent external profile content.

features.title: Profile provenance output
features.description: Reports profile reference kind, packaged profile ID, external profile path, base profile ID, applied overrides, and redaction status in effective deployment output.

features.title: CLI profile runtime wiring
features.description: Wires --profile through CLI dispatch, app assembly, and the deployment resolver so runtime behavior consumes one ResolvedDeployment.

features.title: CLI config deprecation or removal
features.description: Removes --config from the generated CLI contract or deprecates it as a compatibility alias that delegates to --profile without separate semantics.

features.title: Profile reference negative coverage
features.description: Adds negative tests for invalid profile IDs, invalid paths, malformed profile files, unsupported keys, conflicting declarations, and duplicate selector usage.

features.title: Profile reference discovery contract alignment
features.description: Ensures OpenID/OAuth discovery, JWKS URI selection, OpenAPI, OpenRPC, profile snapshots, and evidence artifacts derive from the resolved profile reference.

issues.title: OpenAPI jsonSchemaDialect must be default or omitted
issues.description: Some consumers warn when OpenAPI jsonSchemaDialect is set to a non-default value. Tigrbl Auth contract outputs must omit jsonSchemaDialect, set it to https://spec.openapis.org/oas/3.1/dialect/base, or preserve an upstream Tigrbl-supported OpenAPI 3.1 compatible JSON Schema dialect. The invariant is explicitly tracked and tested.

issues.title: Admin gate must defer runtime contract payloads upstream
issues.description: tigrbl_auth security admin gate previously mutated live /openapi.json and /openrpc.json payloads by injecting security metadata and filtering payload content. Runtime contract payload responsibility is now deferred upstream to tigrbl, and the wrapper is proven by equality tests to forward those payloads without mutation.

issues.title: Active provenance naming blocks certification
issues.description: Active SSOT test rows, active test sources, Tier 3 evidence report paths, retained-boundary generated bundle metadata, copied retained-boundary release-bundle paths, package runtime status values, and current document-authority projections now use capability-scoped names. Certification remains blocked until dirty-worktree release evidence is replaced by clean-checkout evidence and broader legacy generator/report surfaces are normalized or archived.

issues.title: Client JSON-RPC clear returns internal error
issues.description: The published admin JSON-RPC table surface method Client.clear returns JSON-RPC error -32603 Internal error even after retrying with schema-shaped params. This is a runtime defect in the generated clear path rather than an expected invalid-params rejection.

issues.title: LogoutState REST replace returns 500
issues.description: The published admin REST table endpoint PUT /logoutstate/{item_id} returns HTTP 500 Internal Server Error for a synthetic UUID probe where the rest of the table surface fails closed. Replace must return a contract-valid response instead of crashing.

issues.description: The published admin JSON-RPC table surface method PushedAuthorizationRequest.create returns HTTP 204 with an empty body after retry, which violates the expected JSON-RPC response envelope contract.

issues.title: --config duplicates --profile and is declared without valid semantics
issues.description: The CLI metadata declares --config as a runtime/configuration file path, but profile YAMLs are the runtime configuration model. ADR-1065 and SPEC-1087 through SPEC-1089 make --profile the single runtime configuration selector, accepting either packaged profile IDs or external YAML profile paths. Close this issue by removing --config from the generated CLI contract or explicitly deprecating it as a compatibility alias that delegates to --profile without separate semantics, then add validation and negative coverage for duplicate selector usage.

risks.title: Legacy provenance evidence ambiguity
risks.description: Chronology-oriented legacy artifact names can obscure whether claims, tests, evidence, and runtime capability metadata are target scoped and independently certifiable. Active tests, SSOT rows, Tier 3 report paths, retained-boundary metadata, current document-authority projections, and runtime status values are guarded; dirty-worktree release evidence and broader legacy generator/report surfaces remain release-blocking.
